{{CargoRelic
|name=Maze Diagrams
|class_id=20200
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Advisor Zhuge learned the Art of War and created this diagram. It contains eight formations: Overlaying Sky, Loading Ground, Blowing Wind, Hanging Cloud, Flying Dragon, Tiger Wing, Flying Bird, and Coiling Snake. Each corresponds to the method of attack and defense in different situations.
|fame=12
|art=18
|fth=30
|civ=16
|tech=14
|ss1=When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +3%
|ss2=When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +4%
|ss3=When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +5%
|ss4=When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +5%
|ss7=When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +5%<br> (Awakened)
}}
